quote: Operating as a united partnership, we work as one integrated team, leveraging expertise, scale and cultural understanding.
intro: At Mazars Group Communication, I oversaw the brand image globally, managed communication campaigns such as #CreatingSharedValue, developed the Mazars Live app, and coordinated workshops for events involving all communication players worldwide.
mission: Mazars is a leading international audit, tax and advisory firm. We deliver exceptional and tailored services in audit and accounting, as well as tax, financial advisory, consulting and legal services.
We empower our people to help clients navigate complex challenges and seize opportunities.

facts.title: Mission
facts.text: Create cross-media communication that integrates the brand's evolving image, rallies communication teams worldwide, and delivers on time.

facts.title: Process
facts.text: Collaboration with stakeholders, design iterations, internal testing, and delivery to offices in 80+ countries.

facts.title: KPI
facts.text: Cross-media, long-term programme delivered in multiple countries. Awards: Awwwards, Stratégies, Digital Award Berlin.
